name: Fettuccine with Shrimp and Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 small Wedge (5 oz.) Parmesan Cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions in boiling water with oil.
2. While noodles are cooking, melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add chopped garlic and shrimp; cook until shrimp turn pink, but do not allow garlic to turn brown.
4. Add parsley, mushrooms, onions, and red pepper; sauté for 1 minute.
5. Add flour, mix thoroughly, then add wine. Simmer for about 30 seconds.
6. Add cream and heat through.
7. Drain noodles and add them to the sauce with half the grated cheese.
8. Fold gently until noodles are well coated and cheese is melted.
9. Salt lightly.
10. If sauce is too thin, continue heating until sauce reduces to a creamy consistency.
11. If sauce is too thick, add cream.
12. Garnish with chopped parsley and additional grated cheese and serve immediately.
